title: Easter Mini Character Craft Stamps - Pack of 10
features: Our set of 10 Easter stamps comes in an assortment of designs and is great for Easter crafts, card making and letter writing.
Each pack comes with 10 stampers in five assorted colours, with ten different designs including bunnies, chicks, Easter eggs and 'Happy Easter'.
Each stamp is fitted with a cap to prevent the ink from drying out.
Approx size: 3.5cm x 2.5cm / 1.4 in x 1 in
description: Product description Sold: Pack of 10 Approx size: 3.5cm x 2.5cm / 1.4 in x 1 in Material: Plastic and Ink Not suitable for children under 3 years old. Safety Warning Keep away from naked flame
